Tiny model fixture article

A few days ago I've heard that Open Watcom is able to generate tiny model binaries.

This deterministic fixture intentionally includes enough narrative text so background batch capture does not treat it as a partial table-of-contents style extraction. The content is static and designed to be long enough for retry heuristics while still being easy to assert in test logs.

Replacing the wrapper

This section validates that later sections are preserved in capture output.

Full code

wrapper.asm
main.lnk

Additional stable fixture text for deterministic batch capture. This paragraph exists only for test reliability and should remain unchanged unless test expectations are updated at the same time.
